备注: 电网低压降载（逆变器机型根据输出最大电流*电网最低相电压得出的降载功率）
Remarks: Grid low voltage load shedding (load shedding power for inverter models based on maximum output current * lowest grid phase voltage)

备注: 电网过欠压安规降载 (安规的电网过欠压降载)
Remarks: Grid over-undervoltage safety regulation load shedding (grid over-undervoltage load shedding for safety regulation)

备注: 内部(其他)降载（调制比/升压比降载）
Remarks: Internal (other) load shedding (modulation ratio/boost ratio load shedding)

备注: 远程无功(无功百分比)控制
Remarks: Remote reactive power (reactive power percentage) control

备注: 强制关机（二代机独有，三代光伏预留的功能接口）
Remarks: Forced shutdown (unique to 2nd generation machines, functional interface reserved for 3rd generation PV)
